purpose: Use the Stream 28 Promptfoo metadata filter fix to run three mid-size recommended-partial, no-cache, filtered Promptfoo cells for build-synthetic-smoke.

runnerFilterConfirmation.behavior: EVAL_PROMPTFOO_NO_CACHE=true appends --no-cache, and EVAL_TASK_FILTER appends --filter-metadata taskId=<taskFilter> before Promptfoo is spawned.

narrowed: Adds three exact Promptfoo-backed, no-cache, metadata-filtered recommended-partial timeout rows for mid-size models on build-synthetic-smoke.
Confirms the Stream 28 task filter fix applies to these mid-size Promptfoo cells: stderr shows cache disabled and 4 filtered test cases for each row.
notClosed: Broad/full local matrix coverage remains incomplete.
Broad mid-size partial-profile quality and throughput remain incomplete because all three Promptfoo rows timed out before pass totals.
The successful Stream 20 local-fallback partial rows were not reproduced under Promptfoo no-cache build-synthetic-smoke.
Subjective user review, final 3-solid selection, qwen full 40-case no-cache throughput, 31B/31B-QAT practical proof, and final verifier audit remain open.
